project_area: Community-focused arts and/or cultural activities that strengthen local identity and benefit the public
demographic_requirements: Projects must be open to the public, accessible to all, and include consideration for underserved or under-resourced communities in the arts
eligibility_summary: Applicants must be legally established in Maine (501(c)(3) nonprofits, schools, municipalities, or tribal entities) with a valid UEI number. Projects must be community-based, occur within the grant period (July 1, 2026 – June 30, 2027), and comply with all state/federal laws and public policy requirements.
